query: SELECT * FROM employees;
SELECT first_name, last_name FROM employees;
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department_id = {department_id};
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > {amount};
SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC;
SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY hire_date ASC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees;
SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM employees;
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE job_id = '{job_id}';
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE hire_date > '{date}';
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary BETWEEN {min} AND {max};
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE first_name LIKE '{prefix}%';
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE manager_id IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department_id IN ({departments});
SELECT * FROM employees LIMIT {limit};
SELECT e.*, d.department_name FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id;
SELECT e.first_name, j.job_title FROM employees e JOIN jobs j ON e.job_id = j.job_id;
SELECT e.first_name, d.department_name, l.city FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id JOIN locations l ON d.location_id = l.location_id;
SELECT e.first_name, m.first_name AS manager_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.manager_id = m.emp_id;
SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(e.emp_id) FROM departments d LEFT JOIN employees e ON d.department_id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.department_name;
SELECT j.job_title, AVG(e.salary) FROM employees e JOIN jobs j ON e.job_id = j.job_id GROUP BY j.job_title;
SELECT l.city, COUNT(e.emp_id) FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id JOIN locations l ON d.location_id = l.location_id GROUP BY l.city;
SELECT e.first_name FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id WHERE d.department_name = 'HR';
SELECT e.first_name, j.job_title FROM employees e JOIN jobs j ON e.job_id = j.job_id WHERE e.salary > {amount};
SELECT e.first_name, m.first_name FROM employees e JOIN employees m ON e.manager_id = m.emp_id;
SELECT d.department_name, SUM(e.salary) FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY d.department_name;
SELECT e.first_name, l.city FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id JOIN locations l ON d.location_id = l.location_id;
SELECT e.first_name, COUNT(a.date) FROM employees e JOIN attendance a ON e.emp_id = a.emp_id GROUP BY e.emp_id;
SELECT e.first_name, AVG(p.rating) FROM employees e JOIN performance p ON e.emp_id = p.emp_id GROUP BY e.emp_id;
SELECT e.first_name, COUNT(lv.leave_type) FROM employees e JOIN leaves lv ON e.emp_id = lv.emp_id GROUP BY e.emp_id;
SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees;
SELECT MAX(salary) FROM employees;
SELECT MIN(salary) FROM employees;
SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY department_id;
SELECT department_id, AVG(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department_id;
SELECT job_id, MAX(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY job_id;
SELECT department_id, SUM(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department_id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE salary > {amount};
SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY department_id HAVING COUNT(*) > {count};
SELECT job_id, AVG(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY job_id HAVING AVG(salary) > {amount};
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) FROM employees;
SELECT department_id, MIN(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department_id;
SELECT department_id, MAX(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department_id;
SELECT job_id, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY job_id;
SELECT SUM(salary) FROM employees;
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees);
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department_id = (SELECT department_id FROM departments WHERE department_name = 'IT');
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary = (SELECT MAX(salary) FROM employees);
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE emp_id IN (SELECT emp_id FROM performance WHERE rating > {rating});
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE emp_id NOT IN (SELECT emp_id FROM leaves);
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees WHERE department_id = {department_id});
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE emp_id IN (SELECT emp_id FROM attendance WHERE status = 'Absent');
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE job_id IN (SELECT job_id FROM jobs WHERE max_salary > {amount});
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE emp_id IN (SELECT emp_id FROM performance WHERE rating = 5);
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department_id NOT IN (SELECT department_id FROM departments WHERE location_id = {location_id});
SELECT first_name, salary FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT {limit};
SELECT department_id, AVG(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department_id ORDER BY AVG(salary) DESC;
SELECT e.first_name, COUNT(a.date) FROM employees e JOIN attendance a ON e.emp_id = a.emp_id WHERE a.status = 'Absent' GROUP BY e.emp_id;
SELECT e.first_name, p.rating FROM employees e JOIN performance p ON e.emp_id = p.emp_id WHERE p.rating < {rating};
SELECT e.first_name, SUM(DATEDIFF(lv.end_date, lv.start_date)) FROM employees e JOIN leaves lv ON e.emp_id = lv.emp_id GROUP BY e.emp_id;
